title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that pairs Claude Opus for reasoning and planning with Gemini 3.5 Flash for frontend design and UI generation. He argues this composition approach outperforms picking a single model, leveraging Gemini's superior visual output quality at lower cost while retaining Opus for complex integration and judgment tasks.
